---
name: Commit Message Format
description: Conventional commits: feat/fix/chore/docs/test. No bare "update" or "misc". G will revert.
type: feedback
---

G (2026-03-28): "Conventional commits only. If I see 'misc fixes' I'm reverting the PR."

**How to apply:** `<type>(<scope>): <imperative description>`. Types: feat, fix, chore, docs, test, refactor.
